mapper.select: WITH IN_DATA AS ( SELECT A.SYSNAME, A.ROADMCODE, PORT, UNIT, TMPER, IN_VALUE_CUR, IN_VALUE_MIN, IN_VALUE_MAX, IN_VALUE_AVE, OCRTIME, IS_IN_ROW_SIGNAL FROM( SELECT A.SYSNAME, A.ROADMCODE, SPLIT_PART(PORT, '-', 1) AS PORT, UNIT, TMPER , CASE WHEN A.ROADMCODE LIKE 'ROADM' AND PORT LIKE '%LINE_RX%' THEN RXCUR WHEN A.ROADMCODE LIKE 'REPEATER' AND PORT LIKE '%LINE_RX%' THEN RXCUR END AS IN_VALUE_CUR , CASE WHEN A.ROADMCODE LIKE 'ROADM' AND PORT LIKE '%LINE_RX%' THEN RXMIN WHEN A.ROADMCODE LIKE 'REPEATER' AND PORT LIKE '%LINE_RX%' THEN RXMIN END AS IN_VALUE_MIN , CASE WHEN A.ROADMCODE LIKE 'ROADM' AND PORT LIKE '%LINE_RX%' THEN RXMAX WHEN A.ROADMCODE LIKE 'REPEATER' AND PORT LIKE '%LINE_RX%' THEN RXMAX END AS IN_VALUE_MAX , CASE WHEN A.ROADMCODE LIKE 'ROADM' AND PORT LIKE '%LINE_RX%' THEN RXAVE WHEN A.ROADMCODE LIKE 'REPEATER' AND PORT LIKE '%LINE_RX%' THEN RXAVE END AS IN_VALUE_AVE , CASE WHEN A.DIRECTION = 'RX' OR A.DIRECTION = 'ALL' THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS IS_IN_ROW_SIGNAL , OCRTIME FROM( SELECT A.SYSNAME, CASE WHEN B.SYSNAME LIKE '%중계%' THEN 'REPEATER' ELSE 'ROADM' END ROADMCODE , PORT, UNIT, TMPER, DIRECTION, RXCUR, RXMIN, RXMAX, RXAVE, TXCUR, TXMIN, TXMAX, TXAVE, OCRTIME FROM( SELECT DISTINCT SYSNAME, IP, PORT, UNIT, TMPER, DIRECTION , RXCUR, RXMIN, RXMAX, RXAVE , TXCUR, TXMIN, TXMAX, TXAVE, OCRTIME from( SELECT SYSNAME, IP, PORT, UNIT, TMPER , CASE WHEN DIRECTION != NEXT_DIRECTION THEN 'ALL' WHEN DIRECTION != PRE_DIRECTION THEN 'ALL' ELSE DIRECTION END AS DIRECTION , RXCUR, RXMIN, RXMAX, RXAVE , TXCUR, TXMIN, TXMAX, TXAVE, OCRTIME FROM( SELECT SYSNAME, SPLIT_PART(SYSNAME, '-', 1) AS IP, PORT, UNIT, TMPER , DIRECTION, RXCUR, RXMIN, RXMAX, RXAVE , TXCUR, TXMIN, TXMAX, TXAVE, OCRTIME , LEAD(DIRECTION) over CLIENT_WINDOW as NEXT_DIRECTION , LAG(DIRECTION) over CLIENT_WINDOW as PRE_DIRECTION FROM RCA.TB_AI_PERFORMACE_MST WHERE OCRTIME = #{ocrTime}::TIMESTAMP AND (PORT LIKE '%LINE_RX%' OR PORT LIKE '%ADD_IN%') WINDOW CLIENT_WINDOW AS (PARTITION BY SYSNAME ORDER BY SYSNAME, PORT) ) A ) A ) A INNER JOIN NIA.TB_EQUIP_MST B ON A.IP = B.TID ) A ) A WHERE A.IN_VALUE_CUR IS NOT NULL ), OUT_DATA AS ( SELECT A.SYSNAME, A.ROADMCODE, PORT, UNIT, TMPER, OUT_VALUE_CUR, OUT_VALUE_MIN, OUT_VALUE_MAX, OUT_VALUE_AVE, OCRTIME, IS_OUT_ROW_SIGNAL FROM( SELECT A.SYSNAME, A.ROADMCODE, SPLIT_PART(PORT, '-', 1) AS PORT, UNIT, TMPER , CASE WHEN A.ROADMCODE LIKE 'ROADM' AND PORT LIKE '%ADD_IN%' THEN TXCUR WHEN A.ROADMCODE LIKE 'REPEATER' AND PORT LIKE '%LINE_RX%' THEN TXCUR END AS OUT_VALUE_CUR , CASE WHEN A.ROADMCODE LIKE 'ROADM' AND PORT LIKE '%ADD_IN%' THEN TXMIN WHEN A.ROADMCODE LIKE 'REPEATER' AND PORT LIKE '%LINE_RX%' THEN TXMIN END AS OUT_VALUE_MIN , CASE WHEN A.ROADMCODE LIKE 'ROADM' AND PORT LIKE '%ADD_IN%' THEN TXMAX WHEN A.ROADMCODE LIKE 'REPEATER' AND PORT LIKE '%LINE_RX%' THEN TXMAX END AS OUT_VALUE_MAX , CASE WHEN A.ROADMCODE LIKE 'ROADM' AND PORT LIKE '%ADD_IN%' THEN TXAVE WHEN A.ROADMCODE LIKE 'REPEATER' AND PORT LIKE '%LINE_RX%' THEN TXAVE END AS OUT_VALUE_AVE , CASE WHEN A.DIRECTION = 'TX' OR A.DIRECTION = 'ALL' THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS IS_OUT_ROW_SIGNAL , OCRTIME FROM( SELECT A.SYSNAME, CASE WHEN B.SYSNAME LIKE '%중계%' THEN 'REPEATER' ELSE 'ROADM' END ROADMCODE , PORT, UNIT, TMPER, DIRECTION, RXCUR, RXMIN, RXMAX, RXAVE, TXCUR, TXMIN, TXMAX, TXAVE, OCRTIME FROM( SELECT DISTINCT SYSNAME, IP, PORT, UNIT, TMPER, DIRECTION , RXCUR, RXMIN, RXMAX, RXAVE , TXCUR, TXMIN, TXMAX, TXAVE, OCRTIME FROM( SELECT SYSNAME, IP, PORT, UNIT, TMPER , CASE WHEN DIRECTION != NEXT_DIRECTION THEN 'ALL' WHEN DIRECTION != PRE_DIRECTION THEN 'ALL' ELSE DIRECTION END AS DIRECTION , RXCUR, RXMIN, RXMAX, RXAVE , TXCUR, TXMIN, TXMAX, TXAVE, OCRTIME FROM( SELECT SYSNAME, SPLIT_PART(SYSNAME, '-', 1) AS IP, PORT, UNIT, TMPER , DIRECTION, RXCUR, RXMIN, RXMAX, RXAVE , TXCUR, TXMIN, TXMAX, TXAVE, OCRTIME , LEAD(DIRECTION) over CLIENT_WINDOW as NEXT_DIRECTION , LAG(DIRECTION) over CLIENT_WINDOW as PRE_DIRECTION FROM RCA.TB_AI_PERFORMACE_MST WHERE OCRTIME = #{ocrTime}::TIMESTAMP AND (PORT LIKE '%LINE_RX%' OR PORT LIKE '%ADD_IN%') WINDOW CLIENT_WINDOW AS (PARTITION BY SYSNAME ORDER BY SYSNAME, PORT) ) A ) A ) A INNER JOIN NIA.TB_EQUIP_MST B ON A.IP = B.TID ) A ) A WHERE A.OUT_VALUE_CUR IS NOT NULL ) SELECT A.SYSNAME AS sysname, A.ROADMCODE AS roadmCode, A.PORT AS port, A.UNIT AS unit, A.TMPER AS tmper , A.IN_VALUE_CUR AS inValueCur, A.IN_VALUE_MIN AS inValueMin, A.IN_VALUE_MAX AS inValueMax, A.IN_VALUE_AVE AS inValueAve , B.OUT_VALUE_CUR AS outValueCur, B.OUT_VALUE_MIN AS outValueMin, B.OUT_VALUE_MAX AS outValueMax, B.OUT_VALUE_AVE AS outValueAve , A.OCRTIME AS ocrtime, A.IS_IN_ROW_SIGNAL AS isInRowSignal, B.IS_OUT_ROW_SIGNAL AS isOutRowSignal FROM IN_DATA A LEFT OUTER JOIN OUT_DATA B ON A.SYSNAME = B.SYSNAME AND A.PORT = B.PORT ORDER BY SYSNAME, PORT

insert.if:
INSERT INTO RCA.TB_ROADM_OPTICAL_PERFORMANCE ( TRUNK_ID, SYSNAME, ROADM_CODE, PORT, UNIT, TMPER, IN_VALUE_CUR, IN_VALUE_MIN, IN_VALUE_MAX, IN_VALUE_AVE, OUT_VALUE_CUR, OUT_VALUE_MIN, OUT_VALUE_MAX, OUT_VALUE_AVE, OCRTIME, ROUTE_NUM, DIRECTION, IS_IN_ROW_SIGNAL, IS_OUT_ROW_SIGNAL ) VALUES
( #{item.trunkId}, #{item.sysname}, #{item.roadmCode}, #{item.port}, #{item.unit}, #{item.tmper}, #{item.inValueCur}, #{item.inValueMin}, #{item.inValueMax}, #{item.inValueAve}, #{item.outValueCur}, #{item.outValueMin}, #{item.outValueMax}, #{item.outValueAve}, #{item.ocrtime}, #{item.routeNum}, #{item.direction}, #{item.isInRowSignal}, #{item.isOutRowSignal} )
